title: Create: Stellaris
description: Mod that combines Create and Stellaris.
body:
![Neoforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c52e8c02be3fdd667852b896468f00468aca4653.webp)
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This mod is aimed at adding your Create mind into Stellaris by adding recipes and other Create content like machines. So, if you’re a Create mod lover and like Stellaris, I would really recommend giving this mod a try.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**SOME RECIPES**
- any ice type can be crushed in ice shards.
- mixing coal and iron makes a steel ingot.
- Recipe Sequence for engine fan.
- Recipe Sequence for Rocket Engine.
- Recipe Sequence for Rocket.
  
**SOME FEATURES PLANNED**
- Space helmet with goggles(this will take a long time).
- More Recipes.
- More Ponders.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**CREDIT**

Original textures from Stellaris by Exodus Studio
